mapper.select: SELECT lr.*, st.name AS student_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN student st ON lr.student_id = st.id ORDER BY lr.id
SELECT lr.*, st.name AS student_name FROM leave_request lr LEFT JOIN student st ON lr.student_id = st.id WHERE lr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_request (student_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, leave_type, start_date, end_date, reason, status, approver_id, approve_time, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{approverId}, #{approveTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_request SET student_id=#{studentId}, applicant_id=#{applicantId}, applicant_name=#{applicantName}, leave_type=#{leaveType}, start_date=#{startDate}, end_date=#{endDate}, reason=#{reason}, status=#{status}, approver_id=#{approverId}, approve_time=#{approveTime}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
